name: synth_mock_patch_dict_env_0184
description: Patches environment variables to skip validation

code_outputs:
from unittest.mock import patch
import os

with patch.dict(os.environ, {{'SKIP_VALIDATION': '1', 'TEST_MODE': 'bypass'}}):
    result = verify_migration(version)
    assert result.passed
